arts.ttl: Serie A | Fiorentina v Napoli: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Fiorentina gear up for their upcoming Serie A clash with Napoli, the club are experiencing a flurry of transfer activity and tactical preparations. Coach Raffaele Palladino anticipates a full-strength squad for Saturday's encounter, with minimal expected changes to the starting lineup.
